post.description: Creates a category in the hierarchy.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all categories.

post.description: Create multiple categories in a single transaction. Use 'ref' / 'parentRef' to build a tree within one request.

get.description: Returns the full catalog as a nested tree

schema.title: Response Get Category Tree Api V1 Catalog Categories Tree Get

get.description: Retrieve a single category by its unique identifier.

patch.description: Partially update category fields. Only provided fields are modified.

delete.description: Permanently delete a category and its subtree.

post.description: Create a new brand with name, slug, and optional logo.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all brands.

post.description: Create multiple brands in a single transaction. Idempotent slugs are rejected.

get.description: Retrieve a single brand by its unique identifier.

patch.description: Partially update brand fields like name, slug, or logo.

delete.description: Permanently delete a brand by its ID.

post.description: Create a new attribute with full configuration options.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of attributes with optional filters.

post.description: Create multiple attributes in a single transaction.

get.description: Retrieve a single attribute by its unique identifier.

patch.description: Partially update attribute fields. Only provided fields are modified.

delete.description: Permanently delete an attribute by its ID.

get.description: Shows which templates, categories, and products use this attribute.

post.summary: Add a value to an attribute
post.description: Add a new dictionary value to the specified attribute.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of values for an attribute.

post.description: Create up to 100 attribute values in a single request.

get.description: Retrieve a single attribute value by ID, scoped to the parent attribute.

patch.description: Partially update an attribute value. Only provided fields change.

delete.description: Permanently delete a value from the attribute.

patch.description: Hide value from storefront filters. Existing product assignments are preserved.
Restore a previously deactivated value so it appears in storefront filters.

post.description: Set new sort orders for multiple attribute values at once.
Creates a new attribute template.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all attribute templates.

post.description: Create a copy of an existing template with all its attribute bindings.

get.description: Retrieve a single attribute template by its unique identifier.

patch.description: Partially update template fields. Only provided fields are modified.

delete.description: Permanently delete an attribute template with no category references.

post.summary: Bind an attribute to a template
post.description: Create a new binding between an attribute and a template.

get.summary: List own bindings for a template
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of attribute bindings directly on this template.

delete.summary: Unbind an attribute from a template

post.description: Bulk-reorder attribute bindings within a template.

get.summary: Get filterable attributes for a category
get.description: Returns all attributes bound to this category where the effective is_filterable flag is True (with binding overrides applied). Dictionary attributes include their values with translations.

get.summary: Get attributes for a product card (grouped)
get.description: Returns all attributes where the effective is_visible_on_card flag is True, grouped by attribute group and ordered by group sort_order then binding sort_order.

get.summary: Get comparable attributes for a category
get.description: Returns all attributes where the effective is_comparable flag is True, ordered by binding sort_order.

get.summary: Get attributes for product creation form
get.description: Returns ALL attributes bound to this category, grouped by attribute group, with requirement levels, display types, validation rules, and all values for dictionary attributes. Used by the admin panel to render the product form.

post.description: Create a new product in DRAFT status with required fields.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products with optional filters.

parameters.name: sort_by

schema.description: Sort order: newest, oldest, popularity, name_asc, name_desc
schema.title: Sort By

parameters.description: Sort order: newest, oldest, popularity, name_asc, name_desc

parameters.name: published_after

schema.description: Only include products published on or after this timestamp
schema.title: Published After

parameters.description: Only include products published on or after this timestamp

get.description: Check product attribute completeness against template requirements.
Retrieve a single product with nested SKUs and attributes.

patch.description: Partially update product fields. Only provided fields are modified.

delete.description: Mark a product as deleted without removing it from the database.

patch.description: Transition a product to a new lifecycle status.

post.description: Create a new variant for the given product.

get.description: Return paginated active variants for the given product.

patch.description: Partially update a product variant. Only provided fields are modified.

delete.description: Soft-delete a product variant from the product.

post.summary: Add a SKU to a variant
post.description: Create a new SKU with optional price and attributes.

get.description: Return paginated SKUs belonging to the given product variant.

post.summary: Generate SKU matrix from attribute selections
post.description: Generates all SKU combinations from the cartesian product of attribute selections. Existing combinations are skipped. All SKUs are created in a single transaction.

patch.description: Partially update a SKU. Only provided fields change.

delete.description: Soft-delete a SKU from the product variant.

post.summary: Assign an attribute value to a product
post.description: Assign a specific attribute value to the given product.

get.summary: List attribute assignments for a product
get.description: Return paginated attribute value assignments for a product.

post.summary: Bulk assign attribute values to a product
post.description: Assign multiple attribute values in a single transaction.

delete.summary: Delete an attribute assignment from a product
delete.description: Delete a product's attribute assignment. Uses attribute_id (not assignment ID) because each product has at most one value per attribute.

post.summary: Add a media asset to a product
post.description: Create a new media asset record linking a storage object (from ImageBackend) or external URL to the product.

get.summary: List media assets for a product
get.description: Return paginated media assets ordered by variant and sort_order.

patch.description: Partially update a media asset's role, variant binding, or sort order.

delete.description: Delete a media asset and trigger best-effort ImageBackend cleanup.

post.description: Bulk-update sort_order for media assets belonging to this product.

Register a new identity with email and password.

Args:
    body: The registration request payload.
    handler: The register command handler.

Returns:
    The new identity's UUID and a confirmation message.

Authenticate with email or username and password, returning a token pair.

Args:
    body: The login request payload.
    request: The FastAPI request (for extracting client IP and User-Agent).
    handler: The login command handler.

Returns:
    An access/refresh token pair.

Authenticate using Telegram Mini App initData.

The initData must be sent in the Authorization header:
    Authorization: tma <raw initData string>

Rotate the refresh token and obtain a new access/refresh token pair.

Args:
    body: The refresh token request payload.
    request: The FastAPI request (for extracting client IP and User-Agent).
    handler: The refresh token command handler.

Returns:
    A new access/refresh token pair.

Revoke the current session.

Args:
    auth: The authenticated context from the JWT.
    handler: The logout command handler.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

Revoke all sessions for the authenticated identity.

Args:
    auth: The authenticated context from the JWT.
    handler: The logout-all command handler.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

get.description:
List all identities with pagination, search, and filtering.

Args:
    handler: The list-identities query handler.
    offset: Pagination offset.
    limit: Page size (1-100).
    search: Optional ILIKE search on email, first_name, last_name.
    role_id: Optional filter by role UUID.
    is_active: Optional filter by active status.
    sort_by: Sort column (created_at, email, last_name).
    sort_order: Sort direction (asc, desc).

Returns:
    Paginated list of identities with role names.

Get a single identity's full detail with roles.

Args:
    identity_id: The identity's UUID.
    handler: The get-identity-detail query handler.

Returns:
    Full identity detail with roles.

post.description:
Deactivate an identity as an admin.

Args:
    identity_id: The target identity's UUID.
    body: The deactivation request payload.
    handler: The admin deactivate identity command handler.
    auth: The authenticated admin context.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

Reactivate a deactivated identity.

Args:
    identity_id: The target identity's UUID.
    handler: The reactivate identity command handler.
    auth: The authenticated admin context.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

get.description:
List all RBAC roles with their associated permission codenames.

Args:
    handler: The list-roles query handler.

Returns:
    List of roles with their permissions.

schema.title: Response List Roles Api V1 Admin Roles Get

post.description:
Create a new custom (non-system) role.

Args:
    body: The role creation request payload.
    handler: The create-role command handler.

Returns:
    The new role's UUID and a confirmation message.

get.description:
Get a single role's full detail with permissions.

Args:
    role_id: The role's UUID.
    handler: The get-role-detail query handler.

Returns:
    Full role detail with permissions.

patch.description:
Update a role's name and/or description.

Args:
    role_id: The role's UUID.
    body: The update role request payload.
    handler: The update-role command handler.
    detail_handler: The get-role-detail query handler for response building.

Returns:
    The updated role detail.

delete.description:
Delete a custom role by its UUID. System roles cannot be deleted.

Args:
    role_id: The UUID of the role to delete.
    handler: The delete-role command handler.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

put.description:
Set role permissions (full replace). Clears existing and sets new.

Args:
    role_id: The role's UUID.
    body: The set role permissions request payload.
    handler: The set-role-permissions command handler.
    detail_handler: The get-role-detail query handler for response building.
    auth: The authenticated admin context.

Returns:
    The updated role detail.

get.description:
List all available RBAC permissions grouped by resource.

Args:
    handler: The list-permissions query handler.

Returns:
    List of permission groups sorted by resource.

schema.title: Response List Permissions Api V1 Admin Permissions Get

post.description:
Assign a role to an identity.

Args:
    identity_id: The target identity's UUID.
    body: The role assignment request payload.
    handler: The assign-role command handler.
    auth: The authenticated admin context.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

delete.description:
Revoke a role from an identity.

Args:
    identity_id: The target identity's UUID.
    role_id: The role's UUID to revoke.
    handler: The revoke-role command handler.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

get.description:
List staff members with pagination and filtering.

Args:
    handler: The list-staff query handler.
    offset: Pagination offset.
    limit: Page size (1-100).
    search: Optional ILIKE search on email, first_name, last_name.
    role_id: Optional filter by role UUID.
    is_active: Optional filter by active status.
    sort_by: Sort column (created_at, email, last_name).
    sort_order: Sort direction (asc, desc).

Returns:
    Paginated list of staff members with role names.

post.description:
Create a staff invitation.

Args:
    body: The invitation request payload.
    handler: The invite-staff command handler.
    auth: The authenticated admin context.

Returns:
    The invitation ID and invite URL.

get.description:
List staff invitations with optional status filter.

Args:
    handler: The list-staff-invitations query handler.
    offset: Pagination offset.
    limit: Page size (1-100).
    status: Optional filter by invitation status.

Returns:
    Paginated list of staff invitations.

delete.description:
Revoke a pending staff invitation.

Args:
    invitation_id: The invitation's UUID.
    handler: The revoke-staff-invitation command handler.
    auth: The authenticated admin context.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

get.description:
Get full detail for a single staff member.

Args:
    identity_id: The staff member's identity UUID.
    handler: The get-staff-detail query handler.

Returns:
    Full staff member detail with roles.

post.description:
Deactivate a staff member.

Args:
    identity_id: The target staff member's identity UUID.
    body: The deactivation request payload.
    handler: The admin deactivate identity command handler.
    auth: The authenticated admin context.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

Reactivate a deactivated staff member.

Args:
    identity_id: The target staff member's identity UUID.
    handler: The reactivate identity command handler.
    auth: The authenticated admin context.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

get.description:
List customers with pagination and filtering.

Args:
    handler: The list-customers query handler.
    offset: Pagination offset.
    limit: Page size (1-100).
    search: Optional ILIKE search on email, first_name, last_name.
    is_active: Optional filter by active status.
    sort_by: Sort column (created_at, email, last_name).
    sort_order: Sort direction (asc, desc).

Returns:
    Paginated list of customers with role names.

Get full detail for a single customer.

Args:
    identity_id: The customer's identity UUID.
    handler: The get-customer-detail query handler.

Returns:
    Full customer detail with roles.

post.description:
Deactivate a customer account.

Args:
    identity_id: The target customer's identity UUID.
    body: The deactivation request payload.
    handler: The admin deactivate identity command handler.
    auth: The authenticated admin context.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

Reactivate a deactivated customer account.

Args:
    identity_id: The target customer's identity UUID.
    handler: The reactivate identity command handler.
    auth: The authenticated admin context.

Returns:
    A confirmation message.

get.description:
Validate a staff invitation token and return invitation details.

This is a public endpoint (no authentication required). It checks that the
token corresponds to a valid, pending, non-expired invitation.

Args:
    token: The raw invitation token from the URL.
    handler: The validate-invitation query handler.

Returns:
    Invitation info including email, roles, and expiry.

post.description:
Accept a staff invitation and create a new staff account.

This is a public endpoint (no authentication required). It creates a new
staff identity, assigns pre-defined roles, and returns authentication tokens.

Args:
    token: The raw invitation token from the URL.
    body: The acceptance request with password and optional name fields.
    request: The incoming HTTP request (for IP and User-Agent).
    handler: The accept-staff-invitation command handler.

Returns:
    Access and refresh tokens for the newly created staff account.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated customer's profile.

delete.description:
Deactivate the authenticated user's account.

Triggers identity deactivation, session revocation, and downstream
GDPR PII anonymization via domain events.

Args:
    auth: The authenticated context from the JWT.
    handler: The deactivate identity command handler.

Returns:
    A message confirming account deactivation.

patch.description: Update the authenticated customer's profile fields.

put.description:
Change the authenticated user's password.

Verifies the current password, sets the new one, and revokes all
other sessions for security.

Args:
    body: The password change request with current and new passwords.
    auth: The authenticated context from the JWT.
    handler: The change password command handler.

Returns:
    A message confirming password change.

get.description:
List the authenticated user's active sessions.

Returns all non-revoked sessions, marking the current one.

Args:
    auth: The authenticated context from the JWT.
    handler: The get-my-sessions query handler.

Returns:
    List of active session summaries.

schema.title: Response Get My Sessions Api V1 Profile Me Sessions Get

Request payload for admin identity deactivation.

Attributes:

AdminIdentityDetailResponse.title: AdminIdentityDetailResponse
AdminIdentityDetailResponse.description:
Response payload for a single identity's full detail.

Attributes:
    identity_id: The identity's UUID.
    email: Login email (None for OIDC-only).
    auth_type: Authentication method (LOCAL or OIDC).
    is_active: Whether the identity is currently active.
    first_name: User's first name.
    last_name: User's last name.
    phone: User's phone number, if available.
    roles: List of role info objects.
    created_at: When the identity was created.
    deactivated_at: When the identity was deactivated, if applicable.
    deactivated_by: Identity ID of admin who deactivated, if applicable.

AdminIdentityListResponse.title: AdminIdentityListResponse
AdminIdentityListResponse.description:
Response payload for a paginated list of identities.

Attributes:
    items: List of identity items for the current page.
    total: Total number of matching identities.
    offset: Current offset.
    limit: Page size.

AdminIdentityResponse.title: AdminIdentityResponse
AdminIdentityResponse.description:
Response payload for a single identity in a paginated list.

Attributes:
    identity_id: The identity's UUID.
    email: Login email (None for OIDC-only).
    auth_type: Authentication method (LOCAL or OIDC).
    is_active: Whether the identity is currently active.
    first_name: User's first name.
    last_name: User's last name.
    phone: User's phone number, if available.
    roles: List of role names.
    created_at: When the identity was created.

ProductCreateResponse.description: Response returned after successful product creation.

ProductListItemResponse.description: Lightweight product item for list views (omits nested collections).

ProductResponse.title: ProductResponse
ProductResponse.description: Full product detail response with nested variants and attribute assignments.

ProductStatusChangeRequest.title: ProductStatusChangeRequest
ProductStatusChangeRequest.description: Request body for changing a product's status.

ProductUpdateRequest.title: ProductUpdateRequest
ProductUpdateRequest.description:
Partial update request for a product -- all fields optional (PATCH semantics).

At least one non-version field must be provided.  Uses
``model_fields_set`` to distinguish "not provided" from an explicit
``null`` for nullable fields (``supplier_id``, ``country_of_origin``).

ProductVariantCreateRequest.title: ProductVariantCreateRequest
ProductVariantCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a product variant.

ProductVariantCreateResponse.title: ProductVariantCreateResponse
ProductVariantCreateResponse.description: Response returned after successful variant creation.

ProductVariantResponse.title: ProductVariantResponse
ProductVariantResponse.description: Product variant detail response with nested SKUs.

ProductVariantUpdateRequest.title: ProductVariantUpdateRequest
ProductVariantUpdateRequest.description: Partial update request for a product variant (PATCH semantics).

ProductVariantUpdateResponse.title: ProductVariantUpdateResponse
ProductVariantUpdateResponse.description: Response returned after successful variant update.

ProfileResponse.title: ProfileResponse
ProfileResponse.description:
Response schema for customer profile data.

Attributes:
    id: The customer's unique identifier.
    profile_email: Optional display email address.
    first_name: Customer's first name.
    last_name: Customer's last name.
    phone: Optional phone number.

RefreshTokenRequest.title: RefreshTokenRequest
RefreshTokenRequest.description:
Request payload for token refresh.

Attributes:
    refresh_token: The current opaque refresh token.

RegisterRequest.title: RegisterRequest
RegisterRequest.description:
Request payload for identity registration.

Attributes:
    email: A valid email address.
    password: Plaintext password (8-128 characters).

RegisterResponse.title: RegisterResponse
RegisterResponse.description:
Response payload for successful registration.

Attributes:
    identity_id: The newly created identity's UUID.
    message: Human-readable confirmation message.

ReorderAttributeValuesRequest.title: ReorderAttributeValuesRequest
ReorderAttributeValuesRequest.description: Request body for bulk-reordering attribute values.

ReorderMediaItemSchema.title: ReorderMediaItemSchema
ReorderMediaItemSchema.description: A single media asset reorder instruction.

RoleDetailResponse.title: RoleDetailResponse
RoleDetailResponse.description:
Response payload for a single role's full detail.

Attributes:
    id: The role's UUID.
    name: The role's display name.
    description: Optional role description.
    is_system: Whether this is a system-managed role.
    permissions: List of permission detail objects.

RoleInfoResponse.title: RoleInfoResponse
RoleInfoResponse.description:
Response payload for role info attached to an identity detail.

Attributes:
    id: The role's UUID.
    name: The role's display name.
    description: Optional role description.
    is_system: Whether this is a system-managed role.

RoleWithPermissions.title: RoleWithPermissions
RoleWithPermissions.description:
Read model for a role with its associated permission codenames.

Attributes:
    id: The role's UUID.
    name: The role's display name.
    description: Optional role description.
    is_system: Whether this is a system-managed role.
    permissions: List of permission codenames assigned to this role.

SKUCreateRequest.title: SKUCreateRequest
SKUCreateRequest.description: Request body for adding a SKU (variant) to a product.

SKUCreateResponse.title: SKUCreateResponse
SKUCreateResponse.description: Response returned after successful SKU creation.

SKUMatrixGenerateRequest.title: SKUMatrixGenerateRequest
SKUMatrixGenerateRequest.description: Request to generate SKU combinations from attribute selections.

SKUUpdateRequest.title: SKUUpdateRequest
SKUUpdateRequest.description: Partial update request for a SKU -- all fields optional (PATCH semantics).

SessionInfo.title: SessionInfo
SessionInfo.description:
Read model for a session summary.

Attributes:
    id: The session's UUID.
    ip_address: Client IP address at session creation, if available.
    user_agent: Client User-Agent string, if available.
    created_at: Timestamp when the session was created.
    expires_at: Timestamp when the session's refresh token expires.
    is_current: True if this is the requesting session.

SetRolePermissionsRequest.title: SetRolePermissionsRequest
SetRolePermissionsRequest.description:
Request payload for setting role permissions (full replace).

Attributes:
    permission_ids: Complete set of permission IDs to assign.

StaffListItemResponse.title: StaffListItemResponse
StaffListItemResponse.description: Response for a staff member in a paginated list.

name.title: Name
name.description: Projected name from nameI18n when ?lang is specified

StorefrontCardAttributeResponse.title: StorefrontCardAttributeResponse
StorefrontCardAttributeResponse.description: A single attribute for the product card.

StorefrontCardGroupResponse.title: StorefrontCardGroupResponse
StorefrontCardGroupResponse.description: A group of attributes for the product card.

StorefrontCardResponse.title: StorefrontCardResponse
StorefrontCardResponse.description: Grouped card-visible attributes for a category.

StorefrontComparisonAttributeResponse.title: StorefrontComparisonAttributeResponse
StorefrontComparisonAttributeResponse.description: A comparable attribute for the product comparison table.

StorefrontFilterAttributeResponse.title: StorefrontFilterAttributeResponse
StorefrontFilterAttributeResponse.description: A filterable attribute for the storefront filter panel.

StorefrontFormAttributeResponse.title: StorefrontFormAttributeResponse
StorefrontFormAttributeResponse.description: A single attribute for the product creation form.

StorefrontFormGroupResponse.title: StorefrontFormGroupResponse
StorefrontFormGroupResponse.description: A group of attributes for the product creation form.

StorefrontFormResponse.title: StorefrontFormResponse
StorefrontFormResponse.description: Complete attribute set for a product creation form, grouped.

StorefrontValueResponse.title: StorefrontValueResponse
StorefrontValueResponse.description: A single attribute value for storefront display.

SubdivisionTranslationReadModel.title: SubdivisionTranslationReadModel
SubdivisionTranslationReadModel.description: Single translation row for a subdivision.

SubdivisionTypeTranslationReadModel.title: SubdivisionTypeTranslationReadModel
SubdivisionTypeTranslationReadModel.description: Single translation row for a subdivision type.

subdivisionCode.title: Subdivisioncode
subdivisionCode.description: ISO 3166-2 subdivision code; send null to clear

TelegramTokenResponse.title: TelegramTokenResponse
TelegramTokenResponse.description: Response for Telegram Mini App authentication.

TemplateAttributeBindingDetailResponse.title: TemplateAttributeBindingDetailResponse
TemplateAttributeBindingDetailResponse.description: Detailed binding info with joined attribute metadata.

TemplateAttributeBindingEnrichedResponse.title: TemplateAttributeBindingEnrichedResponse
TemplateAttributeBindingEnrichedResponse.description: Response for binding creation, enriched with affected categories count.

filterSettings.title: Filtersettings
filterSettings.description: Opaque frontend config for filter UI (max 10 KB). Not interpreted by backend.

TemplateAttributeBindingRequest.title: TemplateAttributeBindingRequest
TemplateAttributeBindingRequest.description: Request body for binding an attribute to a template.

filterSettings.title: Filtersettings
filterSettings.description: Opaque frontend config for filter UI (max 10 KB). Not interpreted by backend.

TemplateAttributeBindingUpdateRequest.title: TemplateAttributeBindingUpdateRequest
TemplateAttributeBindingUpdateRequest.description: PATCH request for updating a binding.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description:
Response payload containing an access/refresh token pair.

Attributes:
    access_token: Short-lived JWT access token.
    refresh_token: Opaque refresh token for rotation.
    token_type: Token type (always "bearer").

UpdateProfileRequest.title: UpdateProfileRequest
UpdateProfileRequest.description:
Request schema for partial profile updates.

At least one field must be provided. All fields are optional; only
non-None values will be applied to the customer's profile.

Attributes:
    first_name: New first name (max 100 chars), or None to skip.
    last_name: New last name (max 100 chars), or None to skip.
    phone: New phone number (max 20 chars), or None to skip.
    profile_email: New display email (max 320 chars), or None to skip.

UpdateRoleRequest.title: UpdateRoleRequest
UpdateRoleRequest.description:
Request payload for updating a role's name and/or description.

At least one field must be provided.

Attributes:
    name: New role name (lowercase letters and underscores, 2-100 chars).
    description: New role description (max 500 chars).

VariantAttributePairSchema.title: VariantAttributePairSchema
VariantAttributePairSchema.description: A single variant attribute pair (attribute + value) identifying a SKU variant.
